agency: Division of Professions and Occupations - Board of Veterinary Medicine
summary: Additional changes and a complete restructuring of the Board Rules have recently been proposed, thus, this Hearing will be postponed to allow further stakeholder feedback. A new notice will be published to reschedule this Hearing at a later date. The new Hearing date is tentatively scheduled for August 20, 2020.

title: Proposed notice for 3 CCR 702-4
summary: The Division is terminating this proposed regulation due to the ongoing COVID-19 emergency, and the need to ensure that this regulation contains the appropriate testing and coverage requirements as Colorado's COVID-19 response evolves to meet changing needs and as additional federal guidance becomes available.
source_evidence: Department of Regulatory Agencies Division of Insurance 3 CCR 702-4 Series 4-2 2020-00391 06/29/2020 The Division is terminating this proposed regulation due to the ongoing COVID-19 emergency, and the need to ensure that this regulation contains the appropriate testing and coverage requirements as Colorado's COVID-19 response evolves to meet changing needs and as additional federal guidance becomes available.
